account.cardDescription: Update your credentials or review your account's basic information.
account.emailConfirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to your email to validate the change.
account.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 6 characters.
account.roleDescription: Affects the type of profile you have access to.

subscription.stripePortalDescription: Update your card, download invoices, or cancel the subscription.
subscription.cancelScheduledNotice: Your subscription is set to cancel at the end of the period. If you change your mind, you can revert it from the portal.
subscription.cancelDescription: Mercado Pago cuts off access immediately upon cancellation. There is no partial refund for the paid period.
